Class DefaultStringObjectMap<T extends StringObjectMap<T>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.support.DefaultStringObjectMap<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Map<String, @Nullable Object>, StringObjectMap<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
EntityAsMap, Settings
public class DefaultStringObjectMap<T extends StringObjectMap<T>> extends Object implements StringObjectMap<T>
Author:
Peter-Josef Meisch

      public String toJson()

      public @Nullable Object path(String path)
